title: X launches standalone XChat messaging app on iOS
snippet: X has launched XChat's standalone messaging app for iOS, offering private and group chats, file sharing, and audio/video calls. The app emphasises privacy with features like message editing/deletion, disappearing messages, and screenshot blocking, while claiming no ads or tracking.

title: ETtech Explainer: Why Nvidia hit $5 trillion market cap; Intel and AMD rally
